source_notes: This reference describes the simulator's current implemented interpretation, not raw game tooltip text.
Runtime behavior is controlled by data/actions.json, data/buffs.json, data/weapons.json, party presets, transition config, and mechanics modules.
Source workbook references are retained as provenance notes where useful, but this file is documentation only.

scope.title: Mornye Implemented Scope
included: Fusion support character identity and party-capable registry module
Baseline and Wide Field Observation modes
Rest Mass Energy and Relative Momentum caps and state ticking
Basic / WFO Basic action routing using workbook coefficients
Heavy Geopotential Shift and Heavy Inversion routing
Expectation Error / Optimal Solution / Distributed Array Resonance Skill routing modes
Energy Regen stat scaling for Resonance Energy gain and Mornye Liberation crit bonuses
High Syntony Field simplified runtime support
Halo of Starry Radiance 5-set runtime buff
Interfered Marker through Observation Marker + Tune Break
Outro Recursion party 25% All DMG Amplification for 30s
Reviewed Intro / QTE transition metadata and action candidate
excluded: defensive survival value / Proof of Boundedness survival logic
exact Particle Jet / Starburst multi-target behavior
full enemy behavior, hit loss, and movement

resources.name: Rest Mass Energy
resources.notes: Baseline actions add source-aligned core values where clear.

resources.name: Relative Momentum
resources.notes: Wide Field Observation actions add source-aligned core values where clear.

resources.name: Concerto Energy
resources.notes: Uses the shared party Concerto system.

resources.name: Resonance Energy
resources.notes: Critical Protocol costs 175 when the shared resource system is active.

resources.name: Energy Regen
resources.notes: Character stat uses decimal form where 1.0 = 100%. The selected build profile supplies the value; Mornye user profile mornye_user_real_01 uses 2.7944 / 279.44%, while support_er_cap remains a 2.60 / 260% support-test profile.

modes.notes: Default mode. Basic Attack cycles Stage 1 to Stage 4.
Entered by Geopotential Shift and reviewed Intro Convergence. WFO Basic cycles Stage 1 to Stage 3.

states.notes: Generated by Geopotential Shift and reviewed Intro Convergence. Off-Tune Buildup Rate +50% is implemented as a party support-stat buff. Healing uses a simplified field-uptime team_heal proxy for Echo Set triggers; exact healing amount and exact tick timing are not modeled.

Generated by Critical Protocol when Syntony Field is active. High Syntony Field DEF +20%, inherited Off-Tune +50%, simplified heal proxy inheritance, and Critical Protocol same-action buff application are implemented. Exact healing amount and exact tick timing remain unmodeled.
Applied by Heavy Inversion. Observation Marker enables the implemented single-target Interfered Marker flow when a Tune Break is applied.

Aemeath + Mornye party presets use tune_break_triggered. Heavy Inversion applies Observation Marker; Observation Marker + Tune Break applies the non-stacking enemy DMG Taken amp. simplified_on_inversion remains an explicit legacy mode only.

actions.baseline_resolution: normal Heavy or Geopotential Shift at 100 Rest Mass
actions.wfo_resolution: Inversion at 100 Relative Momentum; otherwise unavailable

actions.baseline_resolution: mornye_skill_expectation_error by default; mornye_skill_optimal_solution only in explicit always_success GP diagnostics

timing_model.name: action_time
timing_model.notes: Action lock, internal action progression, hit timing progression, and mechanic state duration ticking.

timing_model.name: combat_time_cost
timing_model.notes: Timed combat clock cost. If omitted from an action, it usually falls back to action_time.

timing_model.name: global_time_stop
timing_model.notes: Source-backed liberation global time stop can make combat_time_cost = 0 while action_time remains nonzero.

timing_model.name: Critical Protocol / Resonance Liberation
timing_model.notes: Excel/source-backed global time stop covers damage timing. Do not treat this as missing timing.

timing_model.name: Mornye Tune Break
timing_model.notes: Tune Break uses its own timing model / stop behavior according to current simulator interpretation.

timing_model.name: Syntony Field damage
timing_model.notes: Manual/simplified field damage action; automatic field damage scheduling is not fully implemented.

timing_model.name: Outro Recursion
timing_model.notes: Transition/outro support action, not a normal policy damage action.

timing_model.name: High Syntony Field State
timing_model.notes: State/buff support action, not a normal damage action.

timing_model.name: Selector / Wrapper Actions
timing_model.placeholder_timing: These selector/wrapper actions are routing placeholders, not source skill timings. They may have 0.1s placeholder timing for routing/fallback and should not be read as real source action timing.
timing_model.notes: Use the resolved action rows above for readable source timing references.

timing_model.name: Timing Source Scope
timing_model.notes: Some Mornye timing source metadata is documented in reports, but this timing_model section is a simulator reference, not a full frame-table reproduction. Exact hit-level timing, hitstop, enemy movement, hit loss, and exact automatic Syntony Field tick scheduling are not fully modeled.

expectation_error_only.notes: Conservative default. Full enemy attack timing and GP/counter success detection are not implemented, so Optimal Solution damage and Rest Mass effects are not automatically applied.

dry_run_success_candidate.notes: Logs Optimal Solution as the likely success follow-up candidate without applying its damage or resource effects.

always_success.notes: Optimistic diagnostics only. This forces GP/counter success and preserves old direct Optimal Solution behavior only when explicitly enabled.

expectation_error_routing.notes: Old direct baseline routing to Optimal Solution has been removed from the default path. Optimal Solution remains present as a conditional success follow-up.

energy_regen_scaling.resonance_energy_gain_formula: final Resonance Energy gain = base gain * actor.energy_regen
energy_regen_scaling.scope: Resonance Energy gain only; costs, Concerto, Rest Mass Energy, Relative Momentum, cooldowns, and direct damage are not scaled by this resource formula.

interfered_marker.duration: 8s default, 20s with Starfield Calibrator effect support
implemented_flow: Observation Marker + Mornye Tune Break applies Interfered Marker.
The damage taken amp is enemy-scoped, non-stacking, and refreshes value/duration.
Interfered Marker modes are optional runtime configuration modes unless a party preset selects one.
simplified_on_inversion is retained only as an explicit legacy diagnostic mode.
not_implemented: full Tune system multi-target conversion is not implemented
full multi-target Tune / Tune Rupture / Tune Strain conversion

intro.notes: QTE/Intro is represented through transition metadata/action data, not a full cinematic/client transition recreation.

effects: inherits simplified team_heal field uptime proxy
Critical Protocol same-action DEF / Off-Tune application

echo_sets.name: Halo of Starry Radiance 5-set
echo_sets.notes: Syntony Field uptime refreshes Halo at action boundaries through the simplified heal proxy. Exact healing amount and exact tick timing are intentionally omitted.

weapons.name: Starfield Calibrator

static_stats.energy_regen_substat: already reflected in user-entered profile if present

runtime_effects.name: Resonance Skill Concerto Restore
runtime_effects.notes: Restores Concerto Energy, not Resonance Energy.

runtime_effects.name: Party Crit DMG on Healing
runtime_effects.stacking: same-name effects do not stack; re-trigger refreshes duration
runtime_effects.notes: Uses existing Mornye Syntony / High Syntony team_heal proxy. Exact healing amount is not modeled.

exclusions: Weapon base/static stats are not applied again at runtime.
2-set Healing Bonus does not directly affect DPS in the current simulator.
Tune Break / Tune Response damage does not use crit unless a future source confirms it.

off_tune.name: Off-Tune Level / Mistune
off_tune.accumulation: Off-Tune buildup uses current party support_stats.off_tune_buildup_rate.
off_tune.reset: Tune Break resets the gauge to 0.

tune_break.name: Mornye Tune Break
tune_break.availability: Conditional on enemy Mistune / Tune Break availability.
tune_break.notes: The simulator implements Excel-based single-target Tune Break / Mistune. Full multi-target Tune Break / Tune Rupture / Tune Strain conversion remains omitted.

response_damage.name: Tune Rupture Response - Particle Jet
response_damage.notes: Off-field party response. Exact multi-target behavior remains omitted.

legacy_modes.name: simplified_on_inversion
legacy_modes.notes: Applies the simplified Interfered Marker damage amp directly on Heavy Inversion. It is retained for comparison and is not the current Aemeath + Mornye party interpretation.

legacy_modes.name: support_er_cap
legacy_modes.notes: Uses 2.60 / 260% Energy Regen to test caps. Current user profile data can provide different Energy Regen, such as 2.7944.

build_profile_damage_type_bonus_notes.title: Build Profile / Damage Type Bonus Notes

profiles.default: Backward-compatible default profile derived from existing characters.json stats.
profiles.support_er_cap: Support-test build assumption using Energy Regen 2.60 / 260% from data/build_profiles.json to reach Mornye Energy Regen scaling caps.
profiles.mornye_user_real_01: User-supplied profile using Energy Regen 2.7944 / 279.44%; runtime mechanics read the selected profile rather than hardcoding Energy Regen in this reference.

damage_categories.notes: Outro is modeled as a party amplification buff, not direct additive damage bonus.

build_profile_damage_type_bonus_notes.notes: Energy Regen remains generic build profile data and is not hardcoded into the damage formula. Mornye-specific Energy Regen effects remain in Mornye mechanics.

known_limitations: This page describes the simulator's modeled interpretation, not a complete game-client recreation.
The current goal is DPS comparison, not exact frame-perfect combat reproduction.
exact healing amount calculation remains omitted.
exact 3s heal tick timing remains omitted.
Full Tune Break multi-target conversion is not implemented; current simulator uses the documented single-target Tune Break / Mistune path.
Full multi-target Tune Break / Tune Rupture / Tune Strain conversion remains omitted; current simulator implements Excel-based single-target Tune Break / Mistune.
full multi-target marker tracking remains omitted.
exact Tune Strain stack system remains omitted.
GP/counter success timing against enemy attacks is not fully modeled.
Optimal Solution is not automatically available in conservative Expectation Error mode.
Old direct baseline Resonance Skill routing to Optimal Solution has been removed from the default path.
Proof of Boundedness defensive survival behavior and interruption resistance survival value do not affect DPS in v1.
Some Mornye timing source metadata is documented in reports, but the timing_model section is a simulator reference, not a full frame-table reproduction.
Exact hit-level timing, hitstop, enemy movement, and hit loss are not modeled.
exact Particle Jet / Starburst multi-target behavior remains omitted.
automatic Syntony Field damage scheduling remains omitted.
simplified_assumptions: Syntony Field and High Syntony Field healing are represented by a field-uptime team_heal proxy for Halo of Starry Radiance 5-set triggering.
Tune Break, Interfered Marker, and Particle Jet are modeled as single-target mechanics.
Exact automatic Syntony Field tick scheduling is not fully modeled.
QTE / Intro transition data is represented through reviewed metadata and transition actions, not a full cinematic/client transition recreation.
